app.title: Veracrypt project update
app.author: super256
app.description: An openly available encryption and virtual machine solution.
proposed_tests: Attempt to encrypt a 10MB file, measure time + output
Compare Veracrypt against CipherShed for FIPS compliance
Run a VM with Veracrypt, measure boot speed vs native
